basics.name: Wenbin Huang
basics.summary: Undergraduate researcher in speech intelligence at Shanghai Jiao Tong University, focusing on AudioLLM, audio-text understanding, and automatic speech recognition.

work.name: X-LANCE Lab, Shanghai Jiao Tong University
work.summary: Working on speech intelligence research under Prof. Kai Yu.
highlights: Research topics include speech intelligence, AudioLLM, audio-text understanding, and ASR.

publications.name: ISA-Bench: Benchmarking Instruction Sensitivity for Large Audio Language Models
publications.summary: Bohan Li*, Wenbin Huang*, Yuhang Qiu*, et al. Accepted paper. Co-first author, oral presentation.

publications.name: RAS: a Reliability Oriented Metric for Automatic Speech Recognition
publications.summary: Wenbin Huang*, Yuhang Qiu*, et al. Co-first author.

portfolio.name: Tomasulo CPU
portfolio.description: RISC-V CPU with Tomasulo scheduling, branch prediction, and instruction cache support.
